title: Managed Repo Audit System — Final Verification, Gap Analysis, and Lockdown

phase_completion.name: VideoFoundry Producer Contract
phase_completion.notes: OpsCenter ready; VideoFoundry producer-side artifact_manifest.json writing not yet implemented

phase_completion.name: Behavior Calibration
phase_completion.notes: Analyzer, rules, anti-collapse guardrails, CalibrationDecision gate

phase_completion.name: Artifacts / Findings / Recommendations Separation
phase_completion.notes: GuardrailViolation on forbidden fields; AST boundary tests; frozen models

phase_completion.name: Mini Regression Suite
phase_completion.notes: run_mini_regression_suite(); suite loader; suite report persistence

phase_completion.name: Full Audit Governance
phase_completion.notes: run_governed_audit(); 8 policy checks; budget/cooldown; manual approval

invariants.name: No Managed Repo Imports
invariants.evidence: grep 'from videofoundry|import videofoundry' src/operations_center/ → 0 matches; AST tests in 15 modules

invariants.name: Contract Ownership
invariants.evidence: All schemas, models, and contracts defined in src/operations_center/; no VideoFoundry-side schema files

invariants.name: Discovery Chain
invariants.evidence: audit_dispatch/lifecycle.py: discover_run_status_bucket() → discover_post_execution() → artifact_manifest_path; 15 lifecycle tests

invariants.name: Manifest as Source of Truth
invariants.evidence: load_artifact_manifest() in artifact_index/loader.py is the only entry point to artifact data

invariants.name: Run Identity Authority
invariants.evidence: prepare_managed_audit_invocation() in run_identity/generator.py; AUDIT_RUN_ID injected before subprocess

invariants.name: One Audit Per Repo
invariants.evidence: Thread-safe ManagedRepoAuditLockRegistry in audit_dispatch/locks.py; acquire_audit_lock(repo_id) raises if held

invariants.name: No Auto-Collapse
invariants.evidence: behavior_calibration/guardrails.py: _FORBIDDEN_MUTATION_FIELDS; assert_no_mutation_fields() raises GuardrailViolation; 35 anti-collapse tests

invariants.name: Recommendations Are Advisory
invariants.evidence: No auto_apply/execute methods in behavior_calibration/; CalibrationDecision.approved_by required; related_recommendation_ids is list[str] context only

invariants.name: Fixture Packs Preserve Provenance
invariants.evidence: FixturePack: source_repo_id, source_run_id, source_audit_type, source_manifest_path, source_index_summary; FixtureArtifact: source_artifact_id, checksum, copied

invariants.name: Replay Is Local and Deterministic
invariants.evidence: slice_replay/runner.py: no subprocess calls; no dispatch import; reads fixture pack only; 46 replay tests

invariants.name: Mini Regression Does Not Escalate
invariants.evidence: mini_regression/runner.py: no dispatch_managed_audit import; grep returns 0 results; 31 suite tests

invariants.name: Full Audit Governance Gates Heavy Runs
invariants.evidence: audit_governance/runner.py: can_dispatch gate; dispatch called only when decision==approved OR approval_validated; 57 governance tests

invariants.name: Mini Regression First
invariants.evidence: audit_governance/policy.py: mini_regression_first_policy; urgency=low/normal without suite report → needs_manual_approval

gaps.description: Phase 5 VideoFoundry producer-side implementation not complete. artifact_manifest.json is not yet written by VideoFoundry. run_status.json does not yet populate artifact_manifest_path for any audit type.
gaps.evidence: config/managed_repos/videofoundry.yaml — all 5 non-representative types note 'finalization gap'; no artifact_manifest.json found in existing VideoFoundry run directories
gaps.recommended_action: Phase 5 VideoFoundry implementation task. All OpsCenter code is ready to consume once Phase 5 is delivered.

gaps.description: Governance budget/cooldown state files use no file locking (flock/fcntl). Concurrent governance run_governed_audit() calls in separate processes could both pass budget checks before either writes the updated count.
gaps.evidence: audit_governance/budgets.py: load_budget_state() and save_budget_state() use Path.read_text()/Path.write_text() with no locking primitive
gaps.recommended_action: Document that governance is designed for single-process use. If multi-process use is needed, add advisory note in CLI and consider atomic write-then-rename as mitigation.

gaps.description: No dedicated integration test for the full Phase 9 → Phase 10 → Phase 11 chain. Unit tests exercise each phase in isolation; no test asserts on the final suite report's status after traversing all three phases from a raw manifest.
gaps.evidence: tests/unit/mini_regression/conftest.py exercises the chain indirectly via fixtures; no tests/integration/test_phase9_10_11_chain.py exists
gaps.recommended_action: Add a single integration test in tests/integration/ exercising harvest → replay → regression end-to-end.

gaps.description: CLI commands for governance (cmd_request, cmd_evaluate, cmd_approve, cmd_run) have no Typer CliRunner tests. The approval round-trip through evaluate → approve → run (file-based) is not tested via CLI invocation.
gaps.recommended_action: Add CLI tests using typer.testing.CliRunner for the request/evaluate/approve/run round-trip.

gaps.description: MiniRegressionSuiteReport.limitations field is never populated by the runner. Fixture pack limitations (from partial runs, failures) are surfaced in SliceReplayReport but not aggregated to the suite report.
gaps.evidence: mini_regression/runner.py lines 208-219 — MiniRegressionSuiteReport construction omits limitations; field always remains []
gaps.recommended_action: Aggregate replay_report.limitations from each entry result into the suite-level report in runner.py.

gaps.description: GovernanceConfig.known_repos=[] (empty default) causes known_repo_required to return status=warning (not failed), meaning an empty config silently permits all repos. This intentional permissive behavior is not explicitly tested or documented.
gaps.evidence: audit_governance/policy.py lines 47-52 — if not known_repos: return PolicyResult(status='warning')
gaps.recommended_action: Add test asserting this explicit behavior. Add config validation warning note when known_repos is empty.

gaps.description: AuditGovernanceReport does not expose the dispatched run_id at the top level. It is nested inside dispatch_result_summary.run_id, making correlation harder in downstream tooling.
gaps.evidence: audit_governance/models.py lines 314-321 — DispatchResultSummary.run_id is nested; no top-level dispatched_run_id field on AuditGovernanceReport
gaps.recommended_action: Add @property on AuditGovernanceReport returning self.dispatch_result_summary.run_id if self.dispatch_result_summary else None.

gaps.description: No real VideoFoundry run has produced a run_status.json with artifact_manifest_path populated. The example in examples/audit_contracts/completed_run_status.json uses a placeholder path.
gaps.evidence: examples/audit_contracts/completed_run_status.json — artifact_manifest_path present but placeholder value; no real runs demonstrate the path
gaps.recommended_action: Update example after Phase 5 delivery with a real path format.

gaps.description: The per-repo audit lock in audit_dispatch/locks.py is process-scoped (in-memory) but this limitation is only documented in locks.py, not in dispatch_managed_audit()'s docstring or the Phase 6 architecture document.
gaps.evidence: audit_dispatch/locks.py line 116 — 'Process-scoped global registry.' Not referenced in api.py docstring or managed_repo_audit_dispatch.md
gaps.recommended_action: Add one-line note in dispatch_managed_audit() docstring. Document in managed_repo_audit_dispatch.md.

gaps.description: No JSON schema file for fixture_pack.json. schemas/ directory has JSON schemas for run_status.json and artifact_manifest.json but not for the fixture pack format.
gaps.evidence: schemas/ directory — audit_contracts/ present; no fixture_harvesting/ or fixture_pack.schema.json
gaps.recommended_action: Generate JSON schema from FixturePack.model_json_schema() and add to schemas/fixture_harvesting/.

gaps.description: make_suite_run_id() uses a second-resolution timestamp; two parallel calls at the same second produce the same ID. MiniRegressionRunRequest.run_id defaults to UUID4 (safe), so this only affects callers explicitly calling make_suite_run_id().
gaps.evidence: mini_regression/models.py lines 188-192 — make_suite_run_id uses strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S'); MiniRegressionRunRequest.run_id defaults to uuid4()
gaps.recommended_action: Add a random suffix to make_suite_run_id() or deprecate in favor of UUID4-based IDs.

lockdown_rules: No new code may bypass Phase 1-12 contracts.
No new discovery paths may bypass run_status.json.
No new artifact consumers may bypass manifest/index.
No calibration output may mutate runtime.
No replay/regression layer may call dispatch.
known_non_goals: No full audit scheduling (daemon, watch loop, cron)
No managed repo Python code imports

final_declaration.remaining_improvements: 11 gaps documented; 0 critical; Phase 5 producer delivery is the primary unblocking dependency
final_declaration.declaration: The managed repo audit system across Phases 0-12 is declared locked as of 2026-04-26. All 13 invariants hold. 1868 unit tests pass. No contract violations found. No forbidden imports. Correct unidirectional import graph enforced by AST tests. The system is ready for Phase 5 producer delivery.
